name: Margarita Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 1 Peel of orange (cut into a continuous spiral)
1 Peel of lime (cut into a continuous spiral)
recipeInstructions:
1. Share a shot of tequila with a friend while making this.
2. Add citrus peel to the remaining tequila in the bottle, and then add the Cointreau to taste.
3. Keep refrigerated and serve in sherry glasses.
4. Remove citrus peel if the liqueur starts to become bitter.
5. It can be served straight or on the rocks with a twist of orange peel.
Take a bottle of this to the host of a dinner party instead of a bottle of wine.
